# Telnyx Code Examples — AI Communications Infrastructure

> Production-ready, deployable code examples for Telnyx APIs across voice, messaging, AI assistants, SIP trunking, and IoT. Each link is the raw README for a self-contained example you can clone, configure, and run independently.

## Voice AI

- [AI Assistant Multiparticipant Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-assistant-multiparticipant-calling-nodejs/README.md): Build a Telnyx Voice AI assistant that answers an inbound call, uses a backend tool to dial a second participant, and joins them into the same live AI conversation with ai_assistant_join.
- [Branded Caller ID Manager](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/branded-caller-id-manager-python/README.md): Branded Caller ID Manager - register, manage, and verify branded calling profiles with STIR/SHAKEN attestation for higher answer rates.
- [Conference Call with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-conference-calling-go/README.md)
- [Conference Call with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-conference-calling-nodejs/README.md)
- [Conference Call with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-conference-calling-php/README.md)
- [Build Conference Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-conference-calling-python/README.md): Create multi-party conference calls.
- [Conference Call with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-conference-calling-ruby/README.md)
- [Build a Conversational Workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-conversational-workflow-nodejs/README.md): Build a Telnyx Conversational Workflow for inbound auto insurance claim intake with structured branches, backend tools, and priority follow-up.
- [Ivr Menu with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-ivr-phone-menu-csharp/README.md)
- [Ivr Menu with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-ivr-phone-menu-go/README.md)
- [Build an IVR Phone Menu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-ivr-phone-menu-nodejs/README.md): Production-ready IVR system using the Telnyx Voice API and Express.js. Answers inbound calls, plays a menu via TTS, collects DTMF input, and routes callers to sales or support.
- [Ivr Menu with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-ivr-phone-menu-php/README.md)
- [Build IVR Phone Menu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-ivr-phone-menu-python/README.md): Build an interactive voice response menu with DTMF input.
- [Ivr Menu with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-ivr-phone-menu-ruby/README.md)
- [Bulk Number Validation & Cleaner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/bulk-number-validation-cleaner-python/README.md): Bulk Number Validation & Cleaner - validate and clean phone number lists via Telnyx Number Lookup API.
- [Call Analytics Dashboard API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-analytics-dashboard-api-python/README.md): Pull call detail records from the Telnyx API and expose call usage analytics through a dashboard API.
- [Call Compliance with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-compliance-go/README.md)
- [Call Compliance with Python and Flask](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-compliance-python/README.md)
- [Call Compliance with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-compliance-ruby/README.md)
- [Call Forwarding with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-forwarding-csharp/README.md)
- [Call Forwarding with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-forwarding-go/README.md)
- [Call Forwarding with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-forwarding-java/README.md)
- [Call Forwarding with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-forwarding-nodejs/README.md)
- [Call Forwarding with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-forwarding-php/README.md)
- [Call Forwarding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-forwarding-python/README.md): Forward incoming calls to another destination.
- [Call Forwarding with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-forwarding-ruby/README.md)
- [Call Queue with Hold Music](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-queue-with-hold-music-python/README.md): Call Queue with Hold Music - queue callers with position announcements and hold music, route to agents.
- [Call Sentiment Live Escalation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-sentiment-live-escalation-python/README.md): Call Sentiment Live Escalation - monitor call transcripts in real-time. When negative sentiment or distress is detected, auto-escalate to a supervisor.
- [Whisper Prompt with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-monitoring-csharp/README.md)
- [Whisper Prompt with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-monitoring-go/README.md)
- [Whisper Prompt with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-monitoring-java/README.md)
- [Whisper Prompt with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-monitoring-nodejs/README.md)
- [Whisper Prompt with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-monitoring-php/README.md)
- [Call Whisper Monitoring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-monitoring-python/README.md): Monitor calls with whisper prompts for agents.
- [Whisper Prompt with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-monitoring-ruby/README.md)
- [Call Whisper & Screen Pop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-whisper-screen-pop-python/README.md): Call Whisper & Screen Pop - whisper caller info to agent before connecting the call.
- [Cloud Storage Call Archive](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/cloud-storage-call-archive-python/README.md): Cloud Storage Call Archive - archive call recordings to Telnyx Cloud Storage (S3-compatible) with searchable metadata.
- [CNAM Caller ID Lookup Enrichment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/cnam-caller-id-lookup-enrichment-python/README.md): CNAM Caller ID Lookup Enrichment - look up CNAM for inbound callers, enrich CRM records with caller identity.
- [Commercial Voice-Over Generator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/commercial-voiceover-generator-python/README.md): Provide product name, target audience, and tone. AI writes 3 script variations with timing marks, TTS renders each in multiple voices, delivers top picks via SMS for client approval.
- [Conference Live Poll via DTMF](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/conference-live-poll-dtmf-python/README.md): Conference Live Poll via DTMF - host asks a question, all conference participants vote by pressing 1-4, results tallied instantly.
- [Turn a Text Chatbot Into a Voice Bot With Conversation Relay](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/conversation-relay-voice-bot-python/README.md): Forward live phone calls to any existing text-in/text-out AI chatbot using Telnyx Conversation Relay — no changes to the bot.
- [Deepfake Voice Detector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/deepfake-voice-detector-python/README.md): Real-time synthetic speech detection on live phone calls. Captures audio via media streaming, extracts acoustic features, scores deepfake probability with AI Inference, alerts security team via Slack.
- [Edge Compute Backend for AI Assistant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-ai-assistant-backend-go/README.md): Use a Telnyx Edge Compute function as the backend for AI Assistant dynamic variables and webhook tool calls — no separate server required.
- [Edge Compliance Monitor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-compliance-monitor-python/README.md): Real-time compliance checking for regulated call centers using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Edge Compute.
- [Edge Fraud Firewall](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-fraud-firewall-python/README.md): Screen every inbound call at the edge with Telnyx Voice, Number Lookup, and AI Inference.
- [Edge Geo Smart Router](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-geo-smart-router-python/README.md): Route calls by geography at the edge using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Edge Compute.
- [Edge IVR A/B Tester](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-ivr-ab-tester-python/README.md): A/B test different IVR flows at the edge.
- [Edge Merge AI Receptionist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-merge-ai-receptionist-python/README.md): Edge worker answers every call using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Edge Compute with Merge HRIS.
- [Edge Merge Reference Checker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-merge-reference-checker-python/README.md): Automate reference checks when an ATS application advances using Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge ATS.
- [Edge Merge Shift Coverage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-merge-shift-coverage-python/README.md): Manager texts need a closer tonight using Telnyx Messaging and Edge Compute with Merge HRIS.
- [Edge Number Masking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-number-masking-python/README.md): Marketplace-style proxy number pool at the edge.
- [Edge Voicemail to Action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-voicemail-to-action-python/README.md): AI-powered voicemail triage at the edge.
- [Edge Webhook Aggregator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-webhook-aggregator-python/README.md): Multi-tenant webhook consolidation at the edge.
- [Fax-to-Structured-Data Pipeline](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/fax-to-structured-data-pipeline-python/README.md): Fax-to-Structured-Data Pipeline - receive faxes, AI extracts structured data (invoices, orders, prescriptions) into JSON.
- [Hold Music with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hold-music-csharp/README.md)
- [Hold Music with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hold-music-go/README.md)
- [Hold Music with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hold-music-java/README.md)
- [Hold Music with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hold-music-nodejs/README.md)
- [Hold Music with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hold-music-php/README.md)
- [Hold Music with Python and Flask](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hold-music-python/README.md)
- [Hold Music with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hold-music-ruby/README.md)
- [Hotel Guest Services Line](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hotel-guest-services-python/README.md): Inbound voice and SMS guest services for hotels. Voice calls are handled by a Telnyx AI Assistant, while SMS requests are categorized and tracked by the Flask app.
- [Live Podcast Call-In Show](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/live-podcast-call-in-python/README.md): Hosts on a conference call, listeners call in. AI screens callers via STT, queues approved ones, generates real-time fact-checks for the host, TTS announces topics.
- [Make Outbound Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/make-outbound-phone-call-csharp/README.md): Place an outbound phone call with the Telnyx Call Control API using C# and ASP.NET.
- [Outbound Call with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/make-outbound-phone-call-go/README.md)
- [Make Outbound Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/make-outbound-phone-call-java/README.md): Place an outbound phone call with the Telnyx Call Control API using Java.
- [Make Outbound Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/make-outbound-phone-call-nodejs/README.md): Initiate an outbound phone call using the Telnyx Call Control API. Exposes an Express endpoint that dials a number and returns the call control ID.
- [Make Outbound Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/make-outbound-phone-call-php/README.md): Place an outbound phone call with the Telnyx Call Control API using PHP.
- [Make Outbound Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/make-outbound-phone-call-python/README.md): Programmatically place an outbound phone call using Telnyx Call Control and handle the call lifecycle.
- [Make Outbound Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/make-outbound-phone-call-ruby/README.md): Place an outbound phone call using the Telnyx Call Control API and the Telnyx Ruby SDK, exposed through a Sinatra endpoint.
- [Media Stream Voice Cloak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/media-stream-voice-cloak-python/README.md): Media Stream Voice Cloak - real-time voice modification via media streaming API. Apply pitch shift, echo, or anonymization.
- [Merge Deal Desk Alerts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-deal-desk-alerts-python/README.md): CRM webhook fires when a deal moves to negotiation, triggering Telnyx Voice and AI Inference alerts with Merge CRM.
- [Merge Employee Hotline](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-employee-hotline-python/README.md): Employees call and authenticate via caller ID using Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge HRIS.
- [Merge Expense by Phone](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-expense-by-phone-python/README.md): Salesperson calls and dictates an expense using Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge Accounting.
- [Merge Interview Pipeline](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-interview-pipeline-python/README.md): ATS webhook fires when a new application arrives, triggering Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Messaging with Merge ATS.
- [Merge Invoice Collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-invoice-collector-python/README.md): Pulls overdue invoices from Merge Accounting and collects payments using Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Messaging.
- [Merge Pipeline Briefing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-pipeline-briefing-python/README.md): Morning pipeline briefing delivered by Telnyx Voice and AI Inference with Merge CRM.
- [Merge Recruitment Hotline](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-recruitment-hotline-python/README.md): Job seekers call a recruitment hotline powered by Telnyx Voice, AI Inference, and Messaging with Merge ATS.
- [Merge Ticket Escalation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-ticket-escalation-python/README.md): Critical ticket fires a webhook from Merge Ticketing, escalating via Telnyx Voice and AI Inference.
- [Multi-Number Identity Router](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/multi-number-identity-router-python/README.md): Multi-Number Identity Router - route calls based on which number was dialed. Each number maps to a different business identity, greeting, and routing destination.
- [Multilingual Voice-Over Kit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/multilingual-voiceover-kit-python/README.md): Submit a script in one language, AI translates to multiple targets preserving tone and timing, TTS renders each language with native-sounding voices. Batch localization for 15 languages.
- [Number Lookup Fraud Screener](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/number-lookup-fraud-screener-python/README.md): Number Lookup Fraud Screener - screen inbound calls/messages for fraud indicators using number lookup before connecting.
- [Number Lookup Lead Enrichment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/number-lookup-lead-enrichment-python/README.md): Number Lookup Lead Enrichment - CNAM and carrier lookup to qualify and enrich sales leads.
- [Number Porting Status Tracker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/number-porting-status-tracker-python/README.md): Number Porting Status Tracker - track porting orders with status webhooks and SMS alerts.
- [Number Reputation Monitor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/number-reputation-monitor-auto-rotate-python/README.md): Number Reputation Monitor - track outbound number reputation, auto-rotate flagged numbers.
- [Number Search and Purchase API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/number-search-and-purchase-api-python/README.md): Number Search and Purchase API - search, filter, and buy phone numbers programmatically.
- [Number Warmup & Reputation Builder](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/number-warmup-reputation-builder-python/README.md): Number Warmup & Reputation Builder - gradually ramp SMS volume on new numbers to build carrier reputation and avoid spam flags.
- [Porting LOA Automation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/porting-loa-automation-python/README.md): Porting LOA Automation - automate Letter of Authorization generation and porting order submission.
- [Porting Order Tracker Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/porting-order-tracker-dashboard-python/README.md): Submit, track, and manage number porting orders with SLA monitoring, timeline visualization, and bulk operations.
- [Provisional Agents with Telnyx Voice API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/provisional-telnyx-voice-api-agents-nodejs/README.md): Start one reusable Telnyx AI Assistant on Telnyx Voice API calls with runtime business instructions selected by the called phone number.
- [Real-Time Call Intelligence Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/real-time-call-intelligence-dashboard-python/README.md): Real-Time Call Intelligence Dashboard - live transcription, sentiment analysis, and competitor detection.
- [Call Recording with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/record-phone-calls-csharp/README.md)
- [Call Recording with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/record-phone-calls-go/README.md)
- [Call Recording with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/record-phone-calls-java/README.md)
- [Record Phone Calls](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/record-phone-calls-nodejs/README.md): Initiate outbound calls and control call recording using the Telnyx Voice API with Express. Handles call lifecycle webhooks and recording start/stop.
- [Call Recording with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/record-phone-calls-php/README.md)
- [Record Phone Calls](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/record-phone-calls-python/README.md): Record calls and receive recording webhooks.
- [Call Recording with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/record-phone-calls-ruby/README.md)
- [Inbound Call Webhook with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-csharp/README.md)
- [Route Phone Calls to AI Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-go/README.md): Receive inbound call webhooks from the Telnyx Voice API and answer calls programmatically with a Go + Gin server.
- [Inbound Call Webhook with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-java/README.md)
- [Route Phone Calls to AI Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-nodejs/README.md): Receive inbound call webhooks from the Telnyx Voice API and answer calls programmatically with an Express server using Call Control.
- [Inbound Call Webhook with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-php/README.md)
- [Route Phone Calls to AI Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-python/README.md): Handle inbound calls with webhook-driven AI routing.
- [Route Phone Calls to AI Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/route-phone-calls-to-ai-agent-ruby/README.md): Handle inbound calls with webhook-driven AI routing using Ruby and Sinatra.
- [Smart Number Geo-Assignment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/smart-number-geo-assignment-python/README.md): Smart Number Geo-Assignment - automatically purchase and assign local numbers based on caller geography to maximize answer rates.
- [TeXML Dynamic Call Router](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/texml-dynamic-call-router-python/README.md): TeXML Dynamic Call Router - time-of-day and caller-based routing with TeXML responses.
- [Text To Speech with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/text-to-speech-phone-call-csharp/README.md)
- [Text To Speech with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/text-to-speech-phone-call-go/README.md)
- [Text To Speech with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/text-to-speech-phone-call-java/README.md)
- [Text-to-Speech Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/text-to-speech-phone-call-nodejs/README.md): Initiate an outbound voice call and play a text-to-speech message on answer using the Telnyx Call Control API.
- [Text To Speech with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/text-to-speech-phone-call-php/README.md)
- [Text to Speech Phone Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/text-to-speech-phone-call-python/README.md): Play text-to-speech audio during a phone call.
- [Text To Speech with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/text-to-speech-phone-call-ruby/README.md)
- [Call Transfer with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/transfer-live-phone-calls-csharp/README.md)
- [Call Transfer with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/transfer-live-phone-calls-go/README.md)
- [Call Transfer with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/transfer-live-phone-calls-java/README.md)
- [Call Transfer with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/transfer-live-phone-calls-nodejs/README.md)
- [Call Transfer with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/transfer-live-phone-calls-php/README.md)
- [Transfer Live Phone Calls](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/transfer-live-phone-calls-python/README.md): Transfer active calls to another number or agent.
- [Call Transfer with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/transfer-live-phone-calls-ruby/README.md)
- [Video Voice-Over Replacement](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/video-voiceover-replacement-python/README.md): Upload audio with existing voice-over. STT extracts the script, AI rewrites/improves it (5 modes: polish, professional, simplify, energize, shorten), TTS re-records with studio quality.
- [Video Webinar Recording Manager](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/video-webinar-recording-manager-python/README.md): Video Webinar Recording Manager - manage video room webinars with automatic recording, transcription, and clip extraction.
- [Call Analytics with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-call-analytics-go/README.md)
- [Call Analytics with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-call-analytics-nodejs/README.md)
- [Call Analytics with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-call-analytics-php/README.md)
- [Call Analytics with Python and Flask](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-call-analytics-python/README.md)
- [Call Analytics with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-call-analytics-ruby/README.md)
- [Voice-to-Slack Bridge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-to-slack-bridge-python/README.md): Voice-to-Slack Bridge - call a phone number, speak a message, AI transcribes and posts to Slack with urgency tagging.
- [Voice-Verified Identity + 2FA](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-verified-identity-2fa-python/README.md): Voice-Verified Identity + 2FA - Number Lookup, SMS OTP, and AI-assisted secure transactions.
- [Voicemail with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voicemail-csharp/README.md)
- [Voicemail with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voicemail-go/README.md)

- [Voicemail with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voicemail-ruby/README.md)
- [Voice-Over Audition Generator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voiceover-audition-generator-python/README.md): Submit a script, hear it read by every available TTS voice. AI scores and ranks best-fit voices based on content, tone, and audience. SMS delivers top picks to decision-makers.
- [Warm Transfer with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/warm-transfer-csharp/README.md)

- [WebRTC Browser Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/webrtc-browser-calling-python/README.md): Enable browser-based calling with WebRTC.
- [WireGuard Private Voice Network](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/wireguard-private-voice-network-python/README.md): WireGuard Private Voice Network - create WireGuard mesh network for private SIP trunking with encrypted voice traffic.

## SMS & MMS

- [Abandoned Cart Recovery](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/abandoned-cart-recovery-python/README.md): SMS 1h after abandon with incentive, AI voice call 24h later if no purchase. Integrates with Shopify webhooks and Stripe for discount codes.
- [Accounting Firm Tax Season Line](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/accounting-tax-season-line-python/README.md): Handles scheduling, document checklist reminders, status updates. AI texts clients with missing doc reminders. CPA reviews readiness before appointments.
- [After-Hours Nurse Triage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/after-hours-nurse-triage-python/README.md): AI screens symptoms using clinical decision tree, routes urgent to on-call nurse via PagerDuty, queues non-urgent for AM callback. Nurse reviews and overrides AI severity scores.
- [AI Appointment Booking SMS Flow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-appointment-booking-sms-flow-python/README.md): AI Appointment Booking SMS Flow - guided SMS booking with available slot selection.
- [AI Appointment Reminder](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-appointment-reminder-sms-voice-python/README.md): AI Appointment Reminder - SMS first, voice call for non-responders, AI handles rescheduling.
- [Alphanumeric Sender ID SMS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/alphanumeric-sender-id-sms-python/README.md): Send SMS messages with a branded alphanumeric sender ID using the Telnyx Messaging API. Validates sender IDs and enforces regional restrictions.
- [Autonomous Outbound Sales Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/autonomous-outbound-sales-agent-python/README.md): Autonomous Outbound Sales Agent - AI-driven lead qualification, objection handling, and meeting booking.
- [Billing Anomaly Detector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/billing-anomaly-detector-python/README.md): Billing Anomaly Detector - monitor usage and billing for anomalies, alert on cost spikes and unusual patterns.
- [CDR Usage Analytics Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/cdr-usage-analytics-dashboard-python/README.md): Pull Call Detail Records, build usage analytics with cost breakdowns, peak-hour analysis, and AI-powered insights.
- [Cloud Storage Media CDN](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/cloud-storage-media-cdn-python/README.md): Cloud Storage Media CDN - use Telnyx Cloud Storage (S3-compatible) as a CDN for IVR prompts, hold music, and voice assets.
- [E911 Address Validator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/e911-address-validator-python/README.md): Validate and register emergency (E911) addresses for phone numbers via the Telnyx API.
- [E-commerce Order Status Bot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ecommerce-order-status-bot-python/README.md): Customers call or text order number, get real-time Shopify tracking. AI detects delivery exceptions and proactively texts customers before they call support.
- [Edge Compute Webhook Proxy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-compute-webhook-proxy-python/README.md): Receive Telnyx voice and SMS webhooks at the edge with minimal latency. Validates, enriches with timestamps, HMAC-signs, and forwards to your backend.
- [MCP Server on Edge Compute](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/edge-mcp-server-deploy-python/README.md): Deploy an MCP server to Telnyx Edge Compute exposing Telnyx APIs as tools for AI agents. Send SMS, search numbers, run inference.
- [E-Learning Course Narrator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/elearning-course-narrator-python/README.md): Upload course content, AI structures into audio modules with pacing cues and quiz prompts, TTS narrates each module, stores in Cloud Storage with a JSON manifest.
- [Emergency Mass Notification System](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/emergency-mass-notification-system-python/README.md): Emergency Mass Notification System - SMS + voice calls with delivery tracking and escalation.
- [Fraud Alert & Verification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/fraud-alert-verification-python/README.md): Suspicious transaction triggers voice call to customer, verifies via DTMF, blocks or approves in real-time. Fraud team reviews edge cases via Slack.
- [Global Lead Response Engine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/global-lead-response-engine-python/README.md): Global Lead Response Engine - multi-language AI qualification with live transfer and omnichannel follow-up.
- [Hosted Messaging Campaign Manager](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/hosted-messaging-campaign-manager-python/README.md): Hosted Messaging Campaign Manager - manage hosted messaging campaigns with subscriber opt-in/out tracking and delivery analytics.
- [Interview Screen & Scheduler](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/interview-screen-scheduler-python/README.md): Candidate applies, AI calls for 5-min phone screen, scores answers, books qualified candidates on hiring manager's calendar. Integrates with Greenhouse ATS and Google Calendar.
- [ISV Notification Engine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/isv-notification-engine-python/README.md): SaaS platform sends alerts via SMS/voice/WhatsApp based on customer preference and urgency. Multi-channel with fallback cascade and delivery tracking.
- [IVR Prompt Generator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ivr-prompt-generator-python/README.md): Generate professional IVR/phone system prompts. AI writes caller-friendly scripts from business descriptions, TTS renders in multiple voices, test via live Telnyx call playback.
- [Law Firm Client Intake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/law-firm-client-intake-python/README.md): AI answers after-hours calls, screens case type, collects facts, runs conflict check, books consultation via Calendly, collects retainer deposit via Stripe.
- [Long Code SMS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/long-code-sms-python/README.md): Send A2P SMS over a long code with a rate-limited queue, delivery tracking, and signed inbound webhooks using the Telnyx Messaging API.
- [Marketplace Comms Bridge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/marketplace-comms-bridge-python/README.md): Buyer texts about a listing, AI responds with details, facilitates anonymous buyer-seller connection via masked numbers, handles scheduling. Ops reviews flagged conversations.
- [Media Stream Custom Audio Mixer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/media-stream-custom-audio-mixer-python/README.md): Media Stream Custom Audio Mixer - mix custom audio into live calls via WebSocket-based media streaming.
- [Media Stream Live Transcription](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/media-stream-live-transcription-python/README.md): Media Stream Live Transcription - fork call audio to WebSocket for real-time transcription display.
- [Merge Employee Onboarding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/merge-employee-onboarding-python/README.md): New employee webhook from Merge HRIS triggers full provisioning: Telnyx phone number, AI voicemail greeting, welcome SMS with IT setup instructions, and IT ticket via Merge Ticketing.
- [Messaging Campaign A/B Test Optimizer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/messaging-campaign-ab-test-optimizer-python/README.md): Messaging Campaign A/B Test Optimizer - test SMS copy variants, AI picks winners, auto-scales.
- [Migrate from ElevenLabs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/migrate-from-elevenlabs-python/README.md): Migrate from ElevenLabs - import ElevenLabs voice configurations to Telnyx TTS with voice mapping and cost comparison.
- [Migrate from Twilio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/migrate-from-twilio-python/README.md): Migrate from Twilio - complete Twilio-to-Telnyx migration tool: numbers, messaging profiles, voice apps, and webhook configs.
- [Migrate from Vapi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/migrate-from-vapi-python/README.md): Migrate from Vapi - import Vapi voice agents to Telnyx AI Assistants with voice, prompt, and tool configuration mapping.
- [Missions Workflow Orchestrator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/missions-workflow-orchestrator-python/README.md): Missions Workflow Orchestrator - create and manage multi-step mission workflows using the Telnyx Missions API.
- [MMS Photo Inventory Tracker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/mms-photo-inventory-tracker-python/README.md): MMS Photo Inventory Tracker - text a photo of inventory items with MMS, AI identifies and catalogs them automatically.
- [MMS Receipt Scanner & Expense Tracker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/mms-receipt-scanner-expense-tracker-python/README.md): MMS Receipt Scanner & Expense Tracker - text a photo of a receipt, AI extracts data and tracks expenses.
- [Multi-Channel Appointment Confirmation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/multi-channel-appointment-confirmation-python/README.md): Multi-Channel Appointment Confirmation - confirm appointments via SMS, voice call, and WhatsApp. Tries SMS first, escalates to voice if no response.
- [Multi-Language Customer Survey](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/multi-language-customer-survey-python/README.md): Multi-Language Customer Survey - outbound voice surveys in the caller's language with AI analysis.
- [Patient Appointment Engine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/patient-appointment-engine-python/README.md): AI answers calls, checks availability, books appointments, collects copay via Stripe, sends SMS confirmation. Staff reviews next-day schedule.
- [Payment Reminder Escalation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/payment-reminder-escalation-python/README.md): Invoice overdue: day 1 SMS, day 7 voice call with payment link, day 14 escalation to collections with full context. Integrates with Stripe/QuickBooks.

- [Podcast Episode Repurposer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/podcast-episode-repurposer-python/README.md): Upload a recorded episode, STT transcribes, AI Inference extracts key quotes and topics, TTS generates audiogram clips with different voices, SMS distributes clips to subscribers.
- [Podcast Highlight Clipper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/podcast-highlight-clipper-python/README.md): Upload audio, STT + AI Inference identifies viral moments with virality scoring, TTS generates teaser intros for each clip, SMS distributes highlights to subscriber list.
- [Post-Service Follow-Up Engine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/post-service-followup-engine-python/README.md): After appointment, SMS satisfaction survey. Negative responses trigger AI voice callback to understand the issue, then creates ticket in Jira and alerts manager via Slack.
- [Prescription Refill Line](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/prescription-refill-line-python/README.md): Patient calls, AI verifies identity (DOB + last 4 of phone), checks refill eligibility, sends approval to pharmacist via Slack. Pharmacist approves/denies, patient gets SMS.
- [Programmable Hold Experience](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/programmable-hold-experience-python/README.md): Programmable Hold Experience - custom hold experiences: tips, trivia, estimated wait time, callback offers.

- [Rent Collection Escalation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/rent-collection-escalation-python/README.md): Automated multi-channel rent reminders. Day 1: SMS + Stripe payment link. Day 3: voice call. Day 7: late fee notice. Day 14: manager escalation.
- [Returns Processor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/returns-processor-python/README.md): Customer texts photo of defective item via MMS, AI evaluates damage, auto-approves low-value refunds via Stripe, escalates high-value to team lead.

- [Send MMS Picture Message (Node.js)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-mms-picture-message-nodejs/README.md): Send an MMS picture message with media attachments using the Telnyx Messaging API and a Node.js and Express endpoint.
- [MMS Send with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-mms-picture-message-php/README.md)
- [Send MMS Picture Message](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-mms-picture-message-python/README.md): Send an MMS message with image attachments using the Telnyx Messaging API.
- [MMS Send with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-mms-picture-message-ruby/README.md)
- [Send SMS (C#)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-csharp/README.md): Send an SMS message using the Telnyx Messaging API with a C# minimal ASP.NET endpoint.
- [Send SMS (Go)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-go/README.md): Send an SMS message using the Telnyx Messaging API and Go SDK, exposed over a Gin HTTP endpoint.
- [Send SMS (Java)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-java/README.md): Send an SMS message using the Telnyx Messaging API and Java SDK, exposed over a JDK HttpServer endpoint.
- [Send SMS (Node.js)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-nodejs/README.md): Send an SMS message using the Telnyx Messaging API with a Node.js and Express endpoint.
- [SMS Notifications with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-notifications-csharp/README.md)
- [SMS Notifications with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-notifications-go/README.md)
- [SMS Notifications with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-notifications-java/README.md)

- [Send SMS Notifications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-notifications-python/README.md): Production-ready Flask service that sends SMS notifications, tracks delivery status via webhooks, and exposes a small REST API.
- [SMS Notifications with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-notifications-ruby/README.md)
- [Send SMS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-php/README.md): Send an SMS message using the Telnyx Messaging API and the Telnyx PHP SDK, exposed through a vanilla PHP front controller.
- [Send SMS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-python/README.md): Send an SMS message using the Telnyx Messaging API. Supports delivery status webhooks.
- [Send SMS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/send-sms-ruby/README.md): Send an SMS message using the Telnyx Messaging API and the Telnyx Ruby SDK, exposed through a Rails controller endpoint.
- [Service Booking & Dispatch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/service-booking-dispatch-python/README.md): Customer calls HVAC/plumber/electrician, AI checks tech availability, books slot, collects deposit via Stripe, texts confirmation to customer and tech.
- [Shift Fill Engine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/shift-fill-engine-python/README.md): Open shift triggers calls down the availability list. First to confirm gets it, rest are cancelled. Texts confirmation + notifies manager via Slack.
- [Shortcode SMS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/shortcode-sms-python/README.md): Send and receive two-way SMS over a Telnyx shortcode with Flask. Includes inbound webhook handling with signature verification.
- [Smart IVR A/B Tester](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/smart-ivr-ab-tester-python/README.md): Smart IVR A/B Tester - run two IVR flows simultaneously and track which converts better.
- [SMS Appointment No-Show Predictor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sms-appointment-no-show-predictor-python/README.md): SMS Appointment No-Show Predictor - AI predicts no-shows from SMS response patterns, triggers interventions.

Auto-handles STOP/UNSUBSCRIBE replies via verified inbound webhooks, blocks messages to opted-out numbers, and keeps an auditable opt-out list in SQLite.

Generates one-time passwords, delivers them over SMS via the Telnyx Messaging API, and verifies them with expiration, attempt limits, and rate limiting.

- [White-Label Appointment Platform](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/white-label-appointment-platform-python/README.md): Multi-tenant SaaS that gives any service business their own AI phone line with booking, reminders, and calendar sync. Each tenant has own number, greeting, and config.
- [x402 USDC Account Funder](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/x402-usdc-account-funder-python/README.md): X402 USDC Account Funder - fund your Telnyx account with USDC cryptocurrency on the Base blockchain.

## AI Assistants

- [AI Adventure Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/adventure-game-python/README.md): AI Adventure Game — a text-based choose-your-own-adventure game where every scene and choice is generated in real time by Telnyx AI Inference.
- [AI After-Hours Emergency Triage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-after-hours-emergency-triage-python/README.md): AI After-Hours Emergency Triage - after-hours calls screened by AI. True emergencies get forwarded to on-call; everything else gets a voicemail + next-day callback promise.
- [AI Assistant Filler Messages Demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-assistant-filler-messages-demo-python/README.md): Webhook server with live split-screen dashboard for demoing AI Assistant filler messages during sync tool calls.
- [AI Assistant Knowledge Base](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-assistant-knowledge-base-python/README.md): AI Assistant Knowledge Base - AI Assistant with document knowledge base for context-aware Q&A over uploaded documents.
- [AI Assistant Multi-Tool](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-assistant-multi-tool-python/README.md): AI Assistant Multi-Tool - AI Assistant with custom function-calling tools for CRM lookup, appointment booking, and order status.
- [AI Assistant Phone Setup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-assistant-phone-setup-python/README.md): AI Assistant Phone Setup - create and configure a managed Telnyx AI Assistant and wire it to a phone number.
- [AI Audiobook Narrator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-audiobook-narrator-python/README.md): Submit text, AI Inference chunks into chapters with pacing/emotion markup, TTS narrates each chapter with consistent voice, stores final audio in Telnyx Cloud Storage.
- [AI Billing Dispute Resolution Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-billing-dispute-resolution-agent-python/README.md): AI Billing Dispute Resolution Agent - handles billing questions with account lookup.
- [AI Call Center Quality Scorer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-call-center-quality-scorer-python/README.md): AI Call Center Quality Scorer - automatically score agent performance from call recordings on compliance, empathy, resolution, and talk-to-listen ratio.
- [AI Cold Caller Objection Trainer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-cold-caller-objection-trainer-python/README.md): AI Cold Caller Objection Trainer - practice handling sales objections with AI-generated scenarios.
- [AI Competitive Win/Loss Call Analyzer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-competitive-win-loss-call-analyzer-python/README.md): AI Competitive Win/Loss Call Analyzer - analyze recorded sales calls for competitive intelligence.
- [AI Compliance Quiz Phone](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-compliance-quiz-phone-python/README.md): AI Compliance Quiz Phone - employees call and take a compliance quiz. AI asks questions, evaluates answers, scores pass/fail, records completion.
- [AI Conference Moderator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-conference-moderator-python/README.md): AI moderator for multi-party calls. Manages agenda, enforces time limits, tracks speakers, produces structured summary with action items.
- [AI Conference Note-Taker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-conference-note-taker-python/README.md): AI Conference Note-Taker - joins calls, transcribes, extracts action items, sends SMS summaries.
- [AI Content Translator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-content-translator-python/README.md): Upload any audio (podcast, meeting, lecture), STT transcribes in source language, AI Inference translates, TTS generates audio in target language. Returns translated transcript and a downloadable dubbed audio file.
- [AI Customer Churn Predictor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-customer-churn-predictor-python/README.md): AI Customer Churn Predictor - analyze call/message patterns via Telnyx APIs, AI predicts churn risk and suggests interventions.
- [AI Customer Winback Caller](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-customer-winback-caller-python/README.md): AI Customer Winback Caller - AI calls churned customers with personalized re-engagement offers.
- [AI Debt Collection Compliance Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-debt-collection-compliance-agent-python/README.md): AI Debt Collection Compliance Agent - FDCPA-compliant outbound collection with real-time guardrails.
- [AI Deposition Assistant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-deposition-assistant-python/README.md): AI joins legal deposition calls, produces real-time transcript, flags objectionable questions, tracks exhibits, generates structured deposition summary.
- [AI Event RSVP Phone Line](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-event-rsvp-phone-line-python/README.md): AI Event RSVP Phone Line - call to RSVP for an event. AI collects guest info, dietary restrictions, plus-ones, and confirms the reservation.
- [AI Hiring Phone Screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-hiring-phone-screen-python/README.md): AI Hiring Phone Screen - automated first-round phone screening for job applicants.
- [AI Insurance Claims Intake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-insurance-claims-intake-voice-python/README.md): AI Insurance Claims Intake - voice agent collects claim details, classifies, routes to adjuster.
- [AI Language Learning Phone Tutor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-language-learning-phone-tutor-python/README.md): AI Language Learning Phone Tutor - call a number, practice a foreign language with AI.
- [AI Live Call Participant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-live-call-participant-python/README.md): AI joins a live multi-human conference call as an active participant. Listens via media streaming, contributes via TTS, takes notes, responds when addressed by name.
- [AI Medical Appointment Prep Caller](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-medical-appointment-prep-caller-python/README.md): AI Medical Appointment Prep Caller - calls patients before appointments to collect intake info.
- [AI Meeting Action Tracker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-meeting-action-tracker-python/README.md): Joins multi-party calls, identifies speakers, extracts action items with owners and deadlines, posts structured notes to Slack.
- [AI Negotiation Practice Phone](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-negotiation-practice-phone-python/README.md): AI Negotiation Practice Phone - practice salary negotiations, sales deals, or vendor contracts with an AI that plays the opposing side and scores your technique.
- [AI Phone Story Hotline](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-phone-story-hotline-python/README.md): AI Phone Story Hotline - call a number, choose a genre, and listen to an AI-generated interactive story where your choices shape the narrative.
- [AI Phone Tree Builder](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-phone-tree-builder-from-description-python/README.md): AI Phone Tree Builder - describe your business in English, AI creates a working phone system.
- [AI Podcast Call-In Show](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-podcast-call-in-show-python/README.md): AI Podcast Call-In Show - callers dial in, AI screens and queues them, host manages live.
- [AI Podcast Post-Producer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-podcast-post-producer-python/README.md): AI Podcast Post-Producer - record a podcast over a conference call, then AI generates show notes, timestamps, highlights, and social media clips.
- [AI Podcast Producer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-podcast-producer-python/README.md): Record a multi-host podcast via conference call, transcribe each speaker with STT, generate show notes + chapters + social clips via AI Inference, and produce TTS intro/outro bumpers.
- [AI-Powered IVR Replacement](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-powered-ivr-replacement-python/README.md): AI-Powered IVR Replacement - natural language routing with A/B testing and structured insights.
- [AI Prescription Refill Intake Voice Assistant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-prescription-refill-intake-voice-assistant-python/README.md): Create a Telnyx AI Assistant that answers prescription refill calls, collects medication and pharmacy details, flags requests for manual review, and queues pharmacy callbacks.
- [AI Price Quote Phone Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-price-quote-phone-agent-python/README.md): AI Price Quote Phone Agent - caller describes what they need, AI generates a customized price quote in real time with line items.
- [AI Property Management Maintenance Line](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-property-management-maintenance-line-python/README.md): AI Property Management Maintenance Line - tenants call, AI triages maintenance requests.
- [AI Real Estate Showing Scheduler](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-real-estate-showing-scheduler-python/README.md): AI Real Estate Showing Scheduler - buyers call or text, AI checks availability and books showings.
- [AI Real-Time Translation Bridge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-real-time-translation-bridge-python/README.md): Connect two callers who speak different languages with real-time AI translation on a live phone call. Built with Telnyx Voice Call Control and AI Inference.
- [AI Receptionist with Booking Tools](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-receptionist-with-booking-tools-python/README.md): AI Receptionist with Booking Tools - AI Assistant with tool_use for real calendar booking actions.
- [AI Restaurant Reservation Voice Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-restaurant-reservation-voice-agent-python/README.md): AI Restaurant Reservation Voice Agent - handles calls, checks availability, books tables, sends SMS confirmation.
- [AI Sales Call with Live CRM Updates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-sales-call-with-live-crm-updates-python/README.md): AI Sales Call with Live CRM Updates - multi-participant call with real-time deal intelligence.
- [AI Sales Coach (Whisper)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-sales-coach-whisper-python/README.md): AI coach listens to a live sales call and whispers real-time suggestions to the rep only. Customer never hears the AI. Generates post-call scorecard.
- [AI Sales Demo Booking Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-sales-demo-booking-agent-python/README.md): AI Sales Demo Booking Agent - inbound calls, AI qualifies the lead, books a demo on the calendar.
- [AI Standup Facilitator Phone](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-standup-facilitator-phone-python/README.md): AI Standup Facilitator Phone - team members call in their daily standup update. AI collects what they did, what they're doing, and blockers, then summarizes for the team.
- [AI Subscription Cancel-Save Retention Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-subscription-cancel-save-retention-agent-python/README.md): Create a Telnyx AI Assistant that handles subscription cancellation calls, offers one eligible save option, and routes cancel, pause, save, follow-up, or escalation outcomes.
- [AI Tech Support Voice Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-tech-support-voice-agent-python/README.md): IT helpdesk voice agent that answers calls, troubleshoots issues using a knowledge base, and escalates to human support via Telnyx Voice AI and Inference.
- [AI Video Dubbing Pipeline](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-video-dubbing-pipeline-python/README.md): Upload audio, STT transcribes with speaker diarization, AI Inference translates to target language, TTS generates dubbed audio with speaker-matched voices. Full STT-to-TTS pipeline.
- [AI Voice Agent with Function Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-voice-agent-with-function-calling-python/README.md): AI Voice Agent with Function Calling - voice agent that calls external APIs mid-conversation.
- [AI Voice Memo to Email](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-voice-memo-to-email-python/README.md): AI Voice Memo to Email - call a number, dictate a memo, AI cleans it up and sends it as a formatted email via Telnyx.
- [AI Voice Survey Sentiment Tracker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-voice-survey-sentiment-tracker-python/README.md): AI Voice Survey Sentiment Tracker - real-time CSAT scoring from voice tone and word choice.
- [AI Voicemail Transcription & Forwarding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-voicemail-transcription-forwarding-python/README.md): AI Voicemail Transcription & Forwarding - voicemail to AI-summarized SMS/email with priority classification.
- [AI Voice-Over Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/ai-voiceover-studio-python/README.md): Upload a script, select voice/style/pacing, AI adds professional direction cues (pauses, emphasis, pacing), TTS renders the voice-over, stores output in Cloud Storage. Supports multiple takes and retakes.
- [Build RAG with Telnyx Inference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-rag-with-telnyx-inference-python/README.md): Build a retrieval-augmented generation API with Telnyx embeddings and chat completions.
- [Build a Voice AI Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-voice-ai-agent-nodejs/README.md): Build a complete voice AI agent with Telnyx - answer inbound calls, transcribe speech, generate replies with Telnyx Inference, and speak them back via Call Control.
- [Build a complete voice AI agent with Telnyx](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/build-voice-ai-agent-python/README.md): Build a complete voice AI agent with Telnyx - inbound call handling, AI conversation, and call control.
- [Call Recording AI Summarizer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/call-recording-ai-summarizer-python/README.md): Call Recording AI Summarizer - record calls, then summarize and extract action items with AI.
- [AI Changelog Generator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/changelog-generator-python/README.md): AI Changelog Generator — turn git commits and diffs into a clean, human-readable changelog via Telnyx AI Inference.

- [Policy Renewal Campaign](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/policy-renewal-campaign-python/README.md): Automated multi-channel renewal reminders. 60 days: SMS. 30 days: AI voice call reviewing coverage changes. 7 days: urgent SMS. Agent reviews lapsed policies for win-back.
- [Restaurant Reservation & Waitlist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/restaurant-reservation-waitlist-python/README.md): AI answers calls, checks table availability, books or adds to waitlist, texts when table is ready. Host reviews large party requests.
- [Run LLM Inference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/run-llm-inference-nodejs/README.md): Run large language model inference through the Telnyx Inference API using an OpenAI-compatible chat completions interface from Node.js. Works as both an HTTP server and a CLI tool.
- [Run LLM Inference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/run-llm-inference-python/README.md): Send chat completion requests to the Telnyx Inference API using an OpenAI-compatible interface from Python.
- [Semantic Search for Support Tickets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/semantic-search-python/README.md): Semantic Search — index support tickets via Telnyx embeddings API and find similar issues by meaning, not keywords. Includes a bundled sample ticket dataset.
- [AI SQL Natural Language](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sql-natural-language-python/README.md): AI SQL Natural Language — turn plain-English questions into validated SQL with schema context via Telnyx AI Inference. Includes a sample dataset for live execution.
- [Storage Voicemail Archive](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/storage-voicemail-archive-python/README.md): Storage Voicemail Archive - record voicemails to Telnyx Cloud Storage with search.
