- [Three-Way Call with AI Interpreter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/three-way-ai-interpreter-python/README.md): Two humans speak different languages on the same call. AI translates in real-time and speaks the translation to each party.
- [Update AI Assistant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/update-ai-assistant-python/README.md): Update an existing Telnyx AI Assistant's configuration, model, system prompt, and tools via the API.
- [Video Room AI Meeting Moderator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/video-room-ai-meeting-moderator-python/README.md): Video Room AI Meeting Moderator - create video rooms with AI-powered agenda tracking and time management.
- [Video Room AI Moderator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/video-room-ai-moderator-python/README.md): Video Room AI Moderator - create video rooms with AI-powered content moderation on chat and participant management.
- [Voice Journal Daily Log](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-journal-daily-log-python/README.md): Voice Journal Daily Log - call a number, speak your daily journal entry, AI transcribes and organizes it with mood, topics, and gratitude extraction.
- [Warm Transfer with AI Briefing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/warm-transfer-ai-briefing-python/README.md): When an agent transfers a call, AI summarizes the conversation and briefs the next agent before connecting. No cold handoffs.
- [Webhook Debugger AI Assistant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/webhook-debugger-ai-assistant-python/README.md): Webhook Debugger AI Assistant - catch, inspect, and debug Telnyx webhooks with AI explanations.
- [WebRTC AI Interpreter for Live Calls](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/webrtc-ai-interpreter-live-calls-python/README.md): WebRTC AI Interpreter for Live Calls - real-time translation between two callers speaking different languages.

## SIP Trunking

- [Configure SIP Codecs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/configure-sip-codecs-python/README.md): Configure audio codecs for SIP trunks.
- [Inbound SIP Routing with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/inbound-sip-routing-csharp/README.md)
- [Inbound SIP Routing with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/inbound-sip-routing-go/README.md)
- [Inbound SIP Routing with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/inbound-sip-routing-java/README.md)
- [Inbound SIP Routing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/inbound-sip-routing-nodejs/README.md): Create and manage Telnyx SIP connections for inbound call routing, and receive inbound call webhooks, using Node.js and Express.
- [Inbound SIP Routing with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/inbound-sip-routing-php/README.md)
- [Inbound SIP Routing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/inbound-sip-routing-python/README.md): Route inbound SIP calls to your endpoints.
- [Inbound SIP Routing with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/inbound-sip-routing-ruby/README.md)
- [Set Up a SIP Trunk (C#)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/setup-sip-trunk-csharp/README.md): Create, list, and retrieve credential-authenticated SIP connections using the Telnyx.net SDK and minimal ASP.NET.
- [Setup SIP Trunk](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/setup-sip-trunk-go/README.md): Create, list, and retrieve Telnyx SIP trunk connections via a Go and Gin REST API.
- [Set Up a SIP Trunk (Java)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/setup-sip-trunk-java/README.md): Create, list, and retrieve credential-authenticated Telnyx SIP connections with the Telnyx Java SDK and the JDK's built-in HTTP server.
- [Set Up a SIP Trunk](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/setup-sip-trunk-nodejs/README.md): Create, retrieve, and list credential-authenticated SIP connections using the Telnyx SIP Trunking API.
- [Set Up a SIP Trunk (PHP)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/setup-sip-trunk-php/README.md): Create, list, and retrieve a Telnyx credential (SIP) connection using the Telnyx PHP SDK over a vanilla PHP front controller.
- [Setup SIP Trunk](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/setup-sip-trunk-python/README.md): Provision and configure a SIP trunk connection on Telnyx with codec preferences, authentication, and failover.
- [Set Up a SIP Trunk (Ruby)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/setup-sip-trunk-ruby/README.md): Create, list, and retrieve credential-authenticated SIP connections using the Telnyx SIP Trunking API with Ruby and Sinatra.
- [CNAM Lookup with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-cnam-lookup-csharp/README.md)
- [CNAM Lookup with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-cnam-lookup-go/README.md)
- [CNAM Lookup with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-cnam-lookup-java/README.md)
- [CNAM Lookup with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-cnam-lookup-nodejs/README.md)
- [CNAM Lookup with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-cnam-lookup-php/README.md)
- [CNAM Lookup with Python and Flask](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-cnam-lookup-python/README.md)
- [CNAM Lookup with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-cnam-lookup-ruby/README.md)
- [Failover Routing with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-failover-routing-go/README.md)
- [Failover Routing with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-failover-routing-nodejs/README.md)
- [SIP Failover Routing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-failover-routing-python/README.md): Configure failover routing for SIP connections.
- [Failover Routing with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-failover-routing-ruby/README.md)
- [SIP Load Balancer Health Check](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-load-balancer-health-check-python/README.md): SIP Load Balancer Health Check - monitor SIP trunk health across multiple endpoints, auto-failover to healthy trunks, track uptime metrics.
- [SIP Registration with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-registration-csharp/README.md)
- [Configure SIP Registration with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-registration-go/README.md)
- [SIP Registration with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-registration-java/README.md)
- [SIP Registration with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-registration-nodejs/README.md)
- [SIP Registration with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-registration-php/README.md)
- [SIP Registration with Python and Flask](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-registration-python/README.md)
- [SIP Registration with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-registration-ruby/README.md)
- [SIP Trunking Failover Monitor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sip-trunking-failover-monitor-python/README.md): SIP Trunking Failover Monitor - health-check SIP connections, auto-failover, SMS alerts.

## IoT & SIM Management

- [Activate SIM Card](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/activate-sim-card-csharp/README.md): Enable (activate) a SIM card on the Telnyx network using C# and ASP.NET.
- [Activate SIM Card](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/activate-sim-card-go/README.md): Activate a Telnyx IoT SIM card over HTTP using the Telnyx Go SDK and Gin.
- [Activate SIM Card](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/activate-sim-card-java/README.md): Activate a Telnyx IoT SIM card over HTTP using the Telnyx Java SDK and the JDK HttpServer.
- [Activate SIM Card](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/activate-sim-card-nodejs/README.md): Retrieve and activate a Telnyx IoT SIM card by ID using the Telnyx Node.js SDK over an Express API.
- [Activate SIM Card (PHP)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/activate-sim-card-php/README.md): Enable (activate) a Telnyx IoT SIM card by ID using the Telnyx PHP SDK over a vanilla PHP front controller.
- [Activate SIM Card](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/activate-sim-card-python/README.md): Activate a SIM card on the Telnyx network.
- [Activate SIM Card](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/activate-sim-card-ruby/README.md): Activate a Telnyx IoT SIM card using Ruby and Sinatra.
- [IoT Fleet Alert Escalation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/iot-fleet-alert-escalation-python/README.md): IoT Fleet Alert Escalation - severity-based routing from IoT sensors to SMS, calls, and multi-party conferences.
- [MQTT Messaging with Python and Flask](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/iot-mqtt-messaging-python/README.md)
- [IoT Panic Button Voice Alert](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/iot-panic-button-voice-alert-python/README.md): IoT Panic Button Voice Alert - IoT device triggers SIM-based alert, system calls emergency contacts with location and status.
- [IoT Smart Building Voice Control](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/iot-smart-building-voice-control-python/README.md): IoT Smart Building Voice Control - call a number to control building systems via AI + IoT SIMs.
- [Data Usage Monitoring with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/monitor-iot-data-usage-csharp/README.md)
- [Data Usage Monitoring with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/monitor-iot-data-usage-go/README.md)
- [Data Usage Monitoring with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/monitor-iot-data-usage-java/README.md)
- [Monitor IoT Data Usage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/monitor-iot-data-usage-nodejs/README.md): Monitor Telnyx IoT SIM card data usage with an Express server that polls usage on an interval and exposes REST endpoints for per-SIM consumption and threshold alerts.
- [Data Usage Monitoring with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/monitor-iot-data-usage-php/README.md)
- [Monitor IoT Data Usage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/monitor-iot-data-usage-python/README.md): Production-ready Flask application for monitoring SIM card data usage via Telnyx IoT API.
- [Data Usage Monitoring with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/monitor-iot-data-usage-ruby/README.md)
- [eSIM Provisioning with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/provision-esim-go/README.md)
- [eSIM Provisioning with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/provision-esim-java/README.md)
- [eSIM Provisioning with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/provision-esim-nodejs/README.md)
- [eSIM Provisioning with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/provision-esim-php/README.md)
- [Provision eSIM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/provision-esim-python/README.md): Provision eSIM profiles over the air.
- [eSIM Provisioning with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/provision-esim-ruby/README.md)
- [SIM Fleet Data Usage Anomaly Detector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/sim-fleet-data-usage-anomaly-detector-python/README.md): SIM Fleet Data Usage Anomaly Detector - monitor IoT SIM usage, AI detects anomalies, SMS alerts.
- [Device Location with C# and ASP.NET](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/track-iot-device-location-csharp/README.md)
- [Device Location with Go and Gin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/track-iot-device-location-go/README.md)
- [Device Location with Java and Spring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/track-iot-device-location-java/README.md)
- [Device Location with Node.js and Express](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/track-iot-device-location-nodejs/README.md)
- [Device Location with PHP and Laravel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/track-iot-device-location-php/README.md)
- [Track IoT Device Location](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/track-iot-device-location-python/README.md): Production-ready Flask application for device location tracking via Telnyx IoT API.
- [Device Location with Ruby and Sinatra](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/track-iot-device-location-ruby/README.md)
- [Voice-Activated IoT Command](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/voice-activated-iot-command-python/README.md): Voice-Activated IoT Command - call a number, speak commands to control IoT devices. AI interprets natural language into device actions dispatched via SIM API.
- [Wireless Fleet Activation Portal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/team-telnyx/telnyx-code-examples/main/wireless-fleet-activation-portal-python/README.md): Bulk activate SIMs with status tracking.
